title: Git support for alerts
body: You can now use Databricks Git folders to track and manage changes to alerts. To track alerts with Git, place them in a Databricks Git folder. Newly cloned alerts only appear in the alerts list page or API after a user interacts with them. They have paused schedules and need to be explicitly resumed by users. See [How Git integration works with alerts](/aws/en/sql/user/alerts/manage#git).

ref_links.text: How Git integration works with alerts
